creator: mi@misha.cisco.com
text:
The current port goes a great distance to build the Tcl
	libraries "The Right Way" (using bsd.lib.mk), but the shared
	library is being immediately overwritten.

	I was unable to fully figure out the purpose of pkg/INSTALL.tclsh.

	The plus-patches by Jan Nijtmans are too good a thing to
	ignore.

Fix: 

Take a look at tcl-8.0.4plus-port.tar.gz in the
		ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/
	Note, that this port will install over whatever tcl8.0 you have.
	(8.1 and others are safe, though).
